presentationContext.title: IT Capability Assessment and Recommendations
presentationContext.context: Present assessment findings combining quantitative maturity data with strategic recommendations. Data should drive charts; narrative should drive action-oriented text slides.

data.text: The assessment reveals [Client] is operating below peer benchmarks in 4 of 5 capability domains, with the largest gaps in Talent & Organization (1.3 points below target) and Strategy & Planning (1.6 points below target). Current investment allocation is heavily weighted toward operational maintenance at 68%, limiting transformation capacity. Recommend rebalancing to 55% Run / 25% Grow / 20% Transform over 24 months. Immediate priorities should focus on establishing a formal IT strategy function and launching a talent development program targeting cloud and data analytics skills. Expected improvement of 0.8-1.2 maturity points within 18 months with proper investment and executive commitment.
